beginning from
the 4 Panaphara or the 4 Apoklima houses. Effects : He will be
handsome, commander of an army, of prepossessing manners,
favourite of kings, strong and possessed of gems and gold orna-
ments, Samtidra : All the planets should be in the 6 even houses
viz. 2. 4. 6, B. 10 and 12. Effects : He will be endowed with
wealth, sons and enjoyment of pleasures, popular, powerful and
equal to a king. Cakva : All the planets should be posited in the
6 odd Bhavas i.e. 1, 3. 5, 7. 9 and 11. Effects : He will receive

148 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
the homage of kings and become a mighty monarch Thus we
have seen the 20 Akrti yogas. From the definition of these
yogas you must have come to understand that in all these the
planets are to be posited in definite geometric patterns.
Sankhydyogas These are Numerical yogas based on the
number of Rasts (not Bhavas) occupied by the 7 planets. You
may in this connection remember that some of these Numerical
